title: BEM-847 execute decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:37 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem846_validate_protocol_draft_decision.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
draft=Path('governance/protocols/BEM845_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_DRAFT.md')
draft_text=read(draft)
created_files=[]
if decision=='APPROVED':
    final=Path('governance/protocols/BEM847_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_FINAL.md')
    final.write_text('# BEM-847 | Agreed Multi-Agent Protocol | FINAL'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+sep+'## Source'+sep+str(draft)+sep+sep+'## Protocol'+sep+sep+draft_text+sep)
    created_files.append(str(final))
    status='final_protocol_created'
    next_action='operator-facing summary and continue roadmap implementation'
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED','UNKNOWN']:
    req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem847_protocol_decision_followup.md')
    req.write_text('# BEM-847 | PROTOCOL DECISION FOLLOWUP'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: current protocol draft decision is '+decision+'. Provide explicit actionable resolution. If CHANGE_REQUIRED or BLOCKED, list exact required changes as table. If APPROVED, state Decision: APPROVED. Write real response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem847_protocol_followup_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v12','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-847 protocol decision followup to Claude','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(req),str(q)])
    status='followup_to_claude_created'
    next_action='fresh tick, read Claude followup, update protocol until final approval'
else:
    status='invalid_decision_state'
    next_action='diagnose decision state'
state={'bem':'BEM-847','status':status,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem847_execute_protocol_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem847_execute_protocol_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-847 | Execute Protocol Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-847'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem847_execute_protocol_decision.json','governance/reports/bem847_execute_protocol_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem847_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-846 decision: finalized protocol when approved or sent followup to Claude when not approved')
"""
No issue comments.
